Levity

No-code AI workflow automation for classifying text, images, and documents

7/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
$49/moStarting Price
2019Founded

About Levity

Levity is a ai automation platform founded in 2019. It positions itself as “No-code AI workflow automation for classifying text, images, and documents” and is best suited for document processing, email classification, content moderation. Pricing starts at $49/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportNo
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingNo
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Train custom AI classifiers without code
  • Good for repetitive classification tasks
  • Integrates with popular automation tools

Cons

  • Narrow use case focus
  • Requires training data for best results
  • Pricing can add up quickly
